text: Is there a way to look at the orders by distributor and location?
For Gigli, we have certain on hands we agreed to keep with them, I cand send you the file if that helps. It shows by location how many units of each flavor we should have on hand at all times

Order quantities seem to be way above or way below. I usually rely on the 30 day weeks of supply column in the inventory report the most when making my orders and when it dips below 4 weeks is when I will usually order something
reply: Fixed and live. It now uses your rule exactly: 30-day velocity, and it only reorders when weeks of supply drops under 4. I pulled out the old blended math that was making the numbers swing high and low. Can you open a few items and tell me if the quantities look right to you now? That is the one I most want to confirm.
